meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Solve Version Control for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop losing code. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to implement professional version control and boost your freelance delivery speed.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates 'no version control' by enforcing a modular, git-ready architecture from line one. By integrating it with Claude Code, you automate repository initialization, branch management, and commit history, ensuring every client project is production-grade, traceable, and infinitely scalable without manual overhead.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: 3 AM, a client is screaming for a feature, and you realize you just nuked the production database because you were working on a single 'final_v2_real.js' file. The lack of robust version control isn't just amateur—it’s a ticking time bomb that destroys trust and kills your hourly rate.

But the era of chaotic, unversioned coding is over. By deploying the Antigravity project template, you transform your workflow from a reckless sprint into a surgical, repeatable process. This isn't just about saving files; it's about building a professional infrastructure that makes you look like a top-tier agency, even when you're working solo.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffolding
steps.description: Establish a rigid, industry-standard directory structure that enforces separation of concerns immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity standard structure, including /src, /tests, /config, and a .gitignore optimized for modern web stacks.

steps.title: Automate Repository Creation
steps.description: Connect your local environment to a remote origin to ensure every change is tracked and recoverable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the local git repository and link it to a new remote GitHub repository named after the client project.
steps.claude_code_command: git init && git add . && git commit -m 'feat: initial commit with antigravity template'

steps.title: Define Feature-Branch Workflow
steps.description: Adopt a branching strategy that prevents 'main' branch corruption during feature development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a branch management policy that forces feature-specific branches and requires code review before merging into main.

steps.title: Integrate Claude Code for Commit Hygiene
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate meaningful, semantic commit messages that explain the 'why' behind the 'what'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current diff and write a conventional commit message following the Angular commit convention.

steps.title: Implement Automated Snapshotting
steps.description: Set up pre-commit hooks to run linting and tests, ensuring no broken code ever hits your history.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Setup husky pre-commit hooks that run the test suite and linter before allowing any commit.
steps.claude_code_command: npm install husky --save-dev && npx husky install

pro_tips: Always use a 'development' branch for client demos to keep the 'main' branch as a pristine production mirror.
Use Claude Code to generate a CHANGELOG.md file automatically from your commit history before every client billing cycle.
Tag your releases (v1.0.0, v1.1.0) to give clients a visual sense of tangible progress and delivery milestones.
Keep your .gitignore file updated with your IDE-specific files to prevent polluting the repository with local configuration junk.
Use short-lived feature branches to minimize merge conflicts when collaborating or juggling multiple client projects.
content.next_steps: Once your repository is live, configure your CI/CD pipeline to deploy automatically on merge, turning your git workflow into a hands-off deployment engine.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting version control debt eat your profit margins. Master the Antigravity template and scale your output like a senior lead developer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
